mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookings (booking_number, booking_begin_date, booking_end_date, name, surname, employer_name, employer_phone, employer_id_number, license_plate, vehicle_type, rental_location, total_amount) VALUES (#{bookingNumber}, #{bookingBeginDate}, #{bookingEndDate}, #{customer.name}, #{customer.surname}, #{customer.employerName}, #{customer.employerPhone}, #{customer.employerIdNumber}, #{licensePlate}, #{vehicleType}, #{rentalLocation}, #{totalAmount})
